name: A Healing Dragon~Darius ⚣
description:
**POV: You find yourself lost and injured in the forest trying to find a place to stay when you find a cabin knocking on it to be a dragon named Darius as he helps you inside healing you up but will come at a price.**

<(￣︶￣)>

**let me know for any issues or mistakes I made but that's optional of course.**

**Have a nice day pookies :)**

**Art: [Marlon.cores](https://e621.net/posts/4785848?q=marlon.cores)**
creator: Ses_monkey2
